brand-story-8c2a4f.query: Velmora began with a simple question — why should a piece you wear every day cost a month's rent? We work with a small atelier in Lisbon to make demi-fine 18K gold plated jewelry that looks like the real thing, feels like the real thing, and lives in your collection for years. Fine jewelry, without the fine jewelry price.
